Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. I-09-187
Re:
This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the post-govemmental
employment provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").r This letter should not
be construed as assistance on any conduct that may have already taken place. Because
your question is general in nature, we are treating your request as one for informal
asslstance.-
QrrEsTroN
What restrictions do the Act's post-governmental employment provisions place
on your activities before various City of Westminster departments, commissions,
employees, and officials upon your retirement from the Westminster Police Department?
CONCLUSION
Because you will not be retiring from a position as a local elected official, a chief
administrative officer of a city or county, or a chief administrator of a special district, the

formal written advice. (Section 831 14. Regulation 18329(c)(3), copy enclosed.)

communications before various City of Westminster departments, commissions,
employees, and officials upon your retirement from the'westminster police o"purt.rrrt.
